column1: # 4 MB flash layout. ota_0 + ota_1 give us A/B firmware slots for safe OTA.
# Each slot is 1.9 MB to leave room for PSRAM-probe-enabled builds plus any
# future code growth. The spiffs partition was reserved earlier for asset
# storage but never got used (the SPA is embedded via include_bytes!)
# we reclaim it as headroom in the OTA slots.
